reference: Hi, if you have had bleeding for two days, there is very little chance of pregnancy. What you can do is take a pregnancy test to confirm it if you have any doubts. If it is negative, then you are not pregnant.
text: Hi. If you have had bleeding for two days, there is very little chance of pregnancy. What you can do is take a pregnancy test to confirm it. If you have any doubts, if it is negative, then you are not pregnant.
